conceptual_reference.title: The Cognitive Bias Codex
conceptual_reference.relationship: Conceptual reference only. The project assets are not a translation or adaptation of the original SVG.

raster_assets.requested_model: gpt-image-2 requested by the user through the ChatGPT subscription route
raster_assets.prompt: Original square editorial illustration: four translucent architectural doorways in a calm 2x2 spatial arrangement around a small central hand mirror; warm ivory paper, charcoal linework, paper-cut collage; balanced accents #5E8B7E, #A97892, #C9835A and #9B9A66; no words, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, people, faces, medical procedure, before-and-after framing, ideal-face ranking, countdown, price tags, radial dendrogram, concentric rings, or Cognitive Bias Codex imitation.

raster_assets.requested_model: gpt-image-2 requested by the user through the ChatGPT subscription route
raster_assets.prompt: Original square editorial illustration: an empty standing mirror surrounded at the edges by blank cropped image cards, blank review-card shapes, repeated translucent fragments and abstract dots; warm ivory paper, charcoal linework, paper-cut collage; #5E8B7E as the only dominant accent; no marks on cards and no words, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, people, faces, medical procedure, before-and-after framing, ideal-face ranking, countdown, price tags, radial diagram, concentric rings, or Cognitive Bias Codex imitation.
